The work is limited to interior modifications and contains no exterior work or structural changes to the building envelope.

Key Elements of the Work:
Ticketing Counter and Office Area (First and Second Floor):
-Installation of new millwork/cabinetry for the ticketing counter.
-Installation of new ticketing windows.
-Installation of new flooring and paint finishes at the ticketing counter.
-Enhancement of security features, including the provision of Level 7 Ballistic-rated security glass and partition walls at the ticketing counter.
-Replacement of the existing lighting system above the Amtrak banner and implementation of a new lighting layout within the ticket office.
-Installation of a double door at the top landing of the main stair.
-Installation of a ballistic-rated door and associated wall build-out leading directly to the ticket office.
-Provision of signage at the ticketing area.
-Finish upgrade at Stair #17 bottom landing with Terrazzo tile flooring.
-Address the floor slope at the elevator and stair at the platform and waiting room.
-Installation of a wall supply vent to accommodate a B25 Travelmark sign.

Amtrak Office and Facility Area:
-Installation of new flooring and ceiling tiles, and new paint finishes throughout the Amtrak office area.
-Modification/replacement of one (1) interior door in the ticket office to accommodate new floors and threshold.
-Installation of additional receptacles within the office space.
-Coordination of new furniture provided by Amtrak (furniture itself is not part of this permit scope).
